title: TrainingExample
description: Canonical training example contract for tokenized data. Unknown fields may be present for forward compatibility and should be ignored.

input_tokens.description: Input token IDs (prompt). Tokens must be < vocab_size.

target_tokens.description: Target token IDs (completion). Tokens must be < vocab_size.

attention_mask.description: Attention mask aligned with input_tokens (1 = real, 0 = pad). Must match input_tokens length.

source_id.description: Logical source identifier for the example.

row_id.description: Stable row identifier within the source.
